Markdown Content:
## Gemini Omni Flash Video Generator & Editor

Create and edit AI videos with prompt, image, video, audio asset, and character asset workflows in Vivify. Independent from Google.

## Gemini Omni Asset Manager

Create and manage private voice and character assets for Gemini Omni Flash. They are optional references, not required inputs.

Sign in to create private Gemini Omni assets.

### Create voice asset

No credit cost. Voice assets are created from a voice description and example dialogue, not from an uploaded audio file.

Name

Voice handle

Voice description

Example dialogue

Audio Assets

No reusable assets yet. Create one here, then select it when using Gemini Omni Flash.

### What these assets do

Gemini Omni can reference text, images, video, and audio-like voice instructions in one video workflow. These assets are reusable shortcuts for that model only; other video models do not use these assets because their workflows do not support Gemini Omni voice or character references.

They are not required. You can generate Gemini Omni videos with just a prompt, or add assets when you need stronger voice or character consistency.

### Privacy and better results

Assets are private to your account and are not published publicly. Use a single, clear character image with the face and outfit visible, then describe what should stay consistent in the prompt.

For voice assets, write a specific tone, pacing, accent, and delivery style. Voice assets are created from a voice description and example dialogue, so there is no audio-file upload in this workflow.

## Create or Edit Video with Gemini Omni Flash

This page uses the same Vivify video generator available across the site, with Gemini Omni Flash selected by default.

1.   01

### Choose a video mode

Use Gemini Omni Flash in Text to Video, Image to Video, or Video Edit. Video Edit requires one source video. 
2.   02

### Write the edit prompt

Describe what should change, what should stay recognizable, the target style, and the motion you want in the edited draft. 
3.   03

### Add optional image references

Attach image references when product look, visual style, lighting, or character direction should guide the output. 
4.   04

### Use advanced assets separately

Audio Assets and Character Assets are subscriber-only tools on this page, separate from the shared generator. 

## Gemini Omni Flash Settings in Vivify

Use these limits to decide whether Gemini Omni Flash fits the edit you want before running the generator.

| Model | Workflow | Input | References | Duration | Resolution | Audio | Credits/run |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Gemini Omni Flash | Text / Image / Video Edit | Prompt + optional images; source video for edits | Images + required edit source video | 4/6/8/10s | 720p/1080p/4K | Subscriber assets | 90-360 credits |

Vivify shows the exact credit cost before each generation. Costs can change with settings and provider availability.

## Plan the Right Gemini Omni Workflow

Gemini Omni Flash is strongest when you choose the right mix of prompt, images, source video, audio assets, and character assets before spending credits.

### Stay inside the 7-unit input budget

Images cost 1 unit, a source video costs 2 units, and each character asset costs 1 unit. Maximum 1 source video and 3 character assets can be used in a request.

### Create Audio Assets before Character Assets

Character Assets depend on active Gemini Omni Audio Assets. Use one character image, keep it under 20MB, then pair it with selected audio assets.

### Choose Gemini Omni Flash when control matters

Choose Gemini Omni Flash when you need multimodal references, source-video edits, reusable voices, or reusable characters. Use the regular AI Video Generator when you only need fast text-to-video or image-to-video drafts.

## Best Fits for Gemini Omni Flash

Use this model when you want a prompt-guided Gemini Omni workflow with reusable voices and characters.

### Social video variations

Refresh a short clip with new lighting, background mood, or visual style while keeping the source motion direction.

### Product video drafts

Use references to guide product look, campaign art direction, surface texture, or studio-style presentation.

### Character-led drafts

Subscribers can create audio and character assets once, then keep them available for advanced Gemini Omni workflows.

## Know the Limits Before You Generate

Gemini Omni Flash in Vivify is a prompt-guided video workspace, not a frame-accurate timeline editor or official Google app.

### Assets are separate

Audio and character asset creation is isolated from the main generator and requires an active subscription.

### Not exact replacement

Use references as direction, not a guarantee of exact object replacement, identity lock, or deterministic continuity.

### Best with simple prompts

Short clips work better when the edit prompt focuses on one primary change and a few preservation details.

## Prompt Gemini Omni Flash Like an Editor

A strong prompt tells the model what to create or preserve, which references matter, and what visual change to make.

### Preserve source details

Name the subject, composition, gesture, product shape, or motion path that should remain recognizable.

### Describe the visual change

Specify the new background, lighting, material, camera feel, color palette, or style treatment you want.

### Add negative direction

Tell the model what to avoid, such as extra objects, identity changes, text changes, or unnatural motion.

## What to Expect from the First Draft

Plan for iteration. AI video editing is useful for fast creative options, but every output still needs review.

### Use short source clips

The workflow is designed around short outputs. Keep the source video clear, direct, and close to the composition you want.

### Review before publishing

Check identity, product details, readable text, motion artifacts, and brand suitability before using a result publicly.

### Iterate with tighter prompts

If the first draft drifts, reduce the number of requested changes and make preservation details more explicit.

Important limits and workflow details before using Gemini Omni Flash in Vivify.
